title: PlayerNoticeBoard
description: A mod adding a notice board that allow players to create quests for others.
body:
A mod adding a notice board that allow players to create quests for others.

You can create two types of quests:
- Harvest quests - where you can ask up to 64 of an item type.
- Hunting quests - where you can ask to kill a specific player.

for each type of quest, you can add rewards.
When someone complete the quest, he will receive the rewards and you your items.

You can also press "J" key to see your on going contracts when you are not near a Notice board.
